hero.title: Our Commitment to You
hero.subtitle: Clear policies and transparent processes to ensure your confidence in every purchase.

pricing.title: Pricing Policy
pricing.text: All prices are quoted in Jordanian Dinars (JOD) and are based on current gold market rates plus craftsmanship fees. Prices are subject to change based on market fluctuations.

confirmation.title: Order Confirmation
confirmation.text: Custom orders require a 50% deposit to begin work. The remaining balance is due upon completion and before delivery. We provide detailed receipts for all transactions.

exchange.title: Exchange Policy
exchange.text: Exchanges are permitted within 7 days of purchase for items of equal or greater value. Items must be in original condition with all tags and packaging intact.

returns.title: Return Policy
returns.text: Custom-designed pieces are non-returnable. Ready-made pieces may be returned within 3 days of purchase in original condition. A 15% restocking fee applies.

custom.title: Custom Design Policy
custom.text: Custom designs require detailed consultation and approval at each stage. Once production begins, modifications may incur additional charges. Final approval is required before delivery.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.text: Local delivery within Amman is complimentary. International shipping is available through secure courier services. All shipments are fully insured.

warranty.title: Warranty & Service
warranty.text: All pieces come with a lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects. Complimentary cleaning and inspection services are provided for the first year.

payment.title: Payment Methods
payment.text: We accept cash, bank transfers, and major credit cards. Payment plans are available for purchases over 500 JOD with approved credit.

1.q: Can I modify my custom design after production starts?
1.a: Modifications after production begins may be possible but will incur additional charges and delays. Major changes may require starting over.

2.q: Do you offer payment plans for large purchases?
2.a: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans for purchases over 500 JOD. Terms and conditions apply.

3.q: How do I care for my jewelry?
3.a: We provide detailed care instructions with each purchase. Complimentary cleaning services are available for the first year.

4.q: What happens if my jewelry needs repair?
4.a: We offer repair services for all our pieces. Warranty covers manufacturing defects, while other repairs are quoted separately.

5.q: Can I track my custom order progress?
5.a: Yes, we provide regular updates and photos throughout the custom design process. You can also contact us anytime for status updates.
